targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM task_instance WHERE task_id = 'convert_one' AND state = 'success' AND end_date > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

SELECT ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (end_date - start_date)) / 60.0)::numeric, 1) AS value FROM task_instance WHERE task_id = 'convert_one' AND state = 'success' AND end_date > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
SELECT date_trunc('hour', end_date) AS time, COUNT(*) AS "converted" FROM task_instance WHERE task_id = 'convert_one' AND state = 'success' AND $__timeFilter(end_date) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT dr.execution_date AS "Run Time", dr.state AS "Run Status", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task_instance ti WHERE ti.run_id = dr.run_id AND ti.dag_id = dr.dag_id AND ti.task_id = 'convert_one' AND ti.state = 'success') AS "Converted", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task_instance ti WHERE ti.run_id = dr.run_id AND ti.dag_id = dr.dag_id AND ti.task_id = 'convert_one' AND ti.state = 'failed') AS "Failed", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task_instance ti WHERE ti.run_id = dr.run_id AND ti.dag_id = dr.dag_id AND ti.task_id = 'convert_one' AND ti.state = 'skipped') AS "Skipped" FROM dag_run dr WHERE dr.dag_id = 'msconvert_watch_simple' ORDER BY dr.execution_date DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT ti.end_date AS "Converted At", x_in.path AS "Input Path", x_outdir.path || '/' || x_outfile.path AS "Output Path" FROM task_instance ti JOIN (SELECT dag_id, run_id, map_index, convert_from(value, 'UTF8')::jsonb #>> '{}' AS path FROM xcom WHERE task_id = 'wait_until_quiet' AND key = 'IN') x_in ON x_in.dag_id = ti.dag_id AND x_in.run_id = ti.run_id AND x_in.map_index = ti.map_index JOIN (SELECT dag_id, run_id, map_index, convert_from(value, 'UTF8')::jsonb #>> '{}' AS path FROM xcom WHERE task_id = 'wait_until_quiet' AND key = 'OUTDIR') x_outdir ON x_outdir.dag_id = ti.dag_id AND x_outdir.run_id = ti.run_id AND x_outdir.map_index = ti.map_index JOIN (SELECT dag_id, run_id, map_index, convert_from(value, 'UTF8')::jsonb #>> '{}' AS path FROM xcom WHERE task_id = 'wait_until_quiet' AND key = 'OUTFILE') x_outfile ON x_outfile.dag_id = ti.dag_id AND x_outfile.run_id = ti.run_id AND x_outfile.map_index = ti.map_index WHERE ti.task_id = 'convert_one' AND ti.state = 'success' AND $__timeFilter(ti.end_date) ORDER BY ti.end_date DESC
